title: Hellendoorn Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Hellendoorn with a Z-Score of +3.29. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Hellendoorn has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is significantly higher than the average, with a CDD of 10.5 GG and no HDD. 
 The humidity is at 45% and the wind speed is 7.2 km/h, making the conditions even more unbearable.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures.
